title: Zeff Explains the Baratie’s Harsh Rules
description: On pages 6–9, the crew reaches the floating restaurant Baratie, where Luffy’s impulsiveness, Fullbody’s arrogance, and Sanji’s sharp code collide.
scene: The Baratie is loud, violent, and rule-bound: cooks fight like pirates, customers cause trouble, and Sanji’s character begins to emerge through conflict.

dialogue.speaker: Zeff
dialogue.text: Customers,

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: At the restaurant's washroom

dialogue.speaker: Zeff
dialogue.text: Are gods!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: baratie's cook, PATTY

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Service is LOVE! Love is this restaurant!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Motto, motto!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Service motto!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: and the foundations of good service,

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Is a kind and pleasant welcome!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Welcome, you Squid- faced bastard!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Please never come back again!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: pardon me; dumbass.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: That'll come to 10,000 bells!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Ahh, that was a good dump!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: I feel great again today!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Motto, motto!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Service motto!

dialogue.speaker: Zeff
dialogue.text: The customers are gods!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: The CUST- owner is being...?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: You again, Sanji!? The hell do you think you're doing to our customer!?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Not only that, that man's also a marine lieutenant!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Hm? Oh, it's just you, the shitty cook.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Don't call my name so casually like that.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: I ain't gonna stand by and let a shitty cook call me a shitty cook!

dialogue.speaker: Zeff
dialogue.text: It's a restaurant's duty to serve its customers!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Just how do you explain you injuring our precious customer?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: So what if he's the customer? He dared to waste our precious food and insulted a cook!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: I was only teaching him a lesson.

dialogue.speaker: Zeff
dialogue.text: What's with this place....!? How can there be a restaurant that ill-treats its customers to this extent...?

dialogue.speaker: Zeff
dialogue.text: I'll close down the restaurant! I'll report this place to the government!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: You're going to report us, are you now...?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Well, then I guess I have no choice but to kill you right now.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: W-WHA...!?

summary: This part introduces the Baratie as more than a restaurant; it is a battlefield of pride, hunger, and harsh principles that will define Sanji’s arc.
